title: Bump github.com/containers/storage from 1.29.0 to 1.30.0
body:
Bumps [github.com/containers/storage](https://github.com/containers/storage) from 1.29.0 to 1.30.0.
Release notes

Sourced from github.com/containers/storage's releases.

v1.30.0

unshare: new function HasCapSysAdmin
btrfs: Do not disable quota on cleanup
build(deps): bump github.com/klauspost/compress from 1.11.13 to 1.12.1
Commits
  • 6a0a2b8 Bump to v1.30.0
  • 8f31414 Merge pull request #877 from giuseppe/add-function-to-check-for-CAP_SYS_ADMIN
  • edf765f unshare: new function HasCapSysAdmin
  • 29560b3 Merge pull request #874 from mrostecki/btrfs-fix-quota
  • 7cc75c3 Merge pull request #876 from containers/dependabot/go_modules/github.com/klau...
  • 382ba6e btrfs: Do not disable quota on cleanup
  • 18e778b build(deps): bump github.com/klauspost/compress from 1.11.13 to 1.12.1
  • 41d901c Merge pull request #875 from rhatdan/version
  • 1fffd79 Move to v1.29.1-dev
  • See full diff in compare view
